notes.howToGetToken: Public read skills do not need a personal token. For token-owned write skills, the user logs in to ZGCY and creates a personal token at /user/<userslug>/skills
notes.signingSecret: Leave empty unless the ZGCY operator explicitly enabled signing and provided the secret
notes.delivery: For external users, only fill this file together with _meta.json and SKILL.md; no extra command-line step is required
